opportunities.title: Ship goal-based AI optimization
opportunities.thesis: Buyers now expect goal → optimize. Creative strength needs a decisioning layer.
opportunities.whyItMatters: TTD / StackAdapt / DV360 are resetting the AI-DSP narrative.
opportunities.move: Closed beta: goal → format/placement optimizer for high-impact units.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Defend budgets shifting to “AI DSP” stories.
recommendedActions: Publish public case proof in 90 days

opportunities.title: Generative studio for Kargo formats
opportunities.thesis: Competitors productize brief → variants → score. Own that loop inside Kargo units.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Creative speed is becoming a buying criterion, not a service add-on.
opportunities.move: Generate format-native variants with predicted attention scoring.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Faster self-serve; lock formats as the generation target.

opportunities.title: Bridge retail media offsite
opportunities.thesis: Retail media pulls brand dollars. Kargo should activate shopper audiences offsite.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Public Criteo ARR and RMN offsite deals show where budgets are going.
opportunities.move: Partner 1–2 RMNs for high-impact offsite; skip rebuilding onsite retail.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Capture brand spend leaving pure open web.

opportunities.title: Own attention → brand outcomes
opportunities.thesis: DSPs now pitch attention pacing. Clarify Kargo’s public methodology first.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Category language Kargo helped popularize is being commoditized.
opportunities.move: One public method card + sales evidence pack vs DSP attention claims.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Keep attention narrative tied to high-impact proof.

opportunities.title: Pilot a brand-safe buying agent
opportunities.thesis: Public capital is chasing agentic buying. Narrow to premium Kargo inventory.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Agents may bypass classic DSP UIs over the next cycle.
opportunities.move: Internal spike: NL plan → Kargo inventory with safety guardrails.
recommendedActions: Guardrails: safety, format fit, attention floors

opportunities.title: Partner ClearLine shoppable CTV
opportunities.thesis: Magnite published shoppable CTV templates — creative can ride supply.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Fast commerce-CTV path without SSP plumbing.
opportunities.move: Pilot one CPG brand already on Kargo mobile.
